stemHtml: Regarding a positively cambered aerofoil section, which statement is correct?

options.a: It will always produce a nose-down pitching moment at every Angle Of Attack.
options.b: A nose-down pitching moment exists when the Lift Coefficient equals zero.
options.c: It will always produce a nose-up pitching moment at every Angle Of Attack.
options.d: A nose-up pitching moment exists when the Lift Coefficient equals zero.
